betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Pot§f

§aBoil soups, stocks, sodas, and teas!§f

The §bPot§f is used for all soup, stock, soda, tea, and specialty drink recipes. It is a reusable crafting utensil that stays in the crafting grid after use.

§6Crafting§f: §e4× Bricks§f + §e1× Stick§f.

§6Recipe Categories§f:
§b• Soups§f: Vegetable, Chicken Noodle, Tomato, Carrot, Potato, Cucumber, Beet, Celery, Rice, Seed, Cactus, Spider Eye, Pumpkin, Creamed Corn, Creamed Broccoli, Cream of Avocado.
§b• Stews§f: Old World Veggie, Miner's Stew, Lamb Barley, Chicken Gumbo, Split Pea, Turnip, Leek Bacon.
§b• Stocks§f: Vegetable Stock, Chicken Stock, Fish Stock — used as the base for many soup recipes.
§b• Sodas§f: Cherry, Cola, Ginger Ale, Grape, Grapefruit, Lemon-Lime, Orange, Root Beer, Strawberry.
§b• Teas§f: Tea, Green Tea, Chai Tea, Raspberry Iced Tea, Rose Petal Tea, Dandelion Tea, Earl Grey, Sweet Tea.
§b• Specialty§f: Energy Drink, Bubble Tea, Boba Tea.

§6Stock Production§f:
Stock is a base ingredient for many soups. §9Place a Water Bucket§f in the Pot alongside §bseeds§f, §bspider eye§f, or §bdirt§f to craft a generic stock that unlocks downstream soup recipes.

§6Soda Production§f:
Sodas require §bBubbly Water§f (from the §bPresser§f) + §bSugar§f + a flavoring fruit. The §bEnergy Drink§f is a special Pot recipe (§bWater Bucket§f + §bRedstone§f) that grants §e5 hunger§f and a §eSpeed§f boost.

§eTip§f: The Pot is essential for both food and drink production. Pair with a Presser (for Bubbly Water) and a Sugar Cane farm to scale your soda output.
